resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def sortPeople(self, names: List[str], heights: List[int]) -> List[str]:
        return [name for _, name in sorted(zip(heights, names), reverse=True)]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n log n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Pair each name with its height, sort the pairs by height in descending order, then extract the names. Uses Python’s built-in Timsort (stable) and list comprehension for concise, efficient code.
